2157770.name: 星の欠片の物語。しかけ版　【期間限定特典】
2157770.description:
Note: This downloadable content is "Tale of the Fragmented Star: Four Puzzling Pieces" for a limited time only.
The download will end one month after the release, so please download it as soon as possible.

Benefit 1: "Tale of the Fragmented Star: Four Puzzling Pieces" making.

This is a reading material containing the process of making this work, setting materials, etc.

Benefit 2: "Tale of the Fragmented Star: Four Puzzling Pieces" script data that can be played back in audio format.

This is an application that allows you to read the script with acting explanations and situational commentary for Rika Abe, and play the audio when you select a scene.

Benefit 3: "Tale of the Fragmented Star: Four Puzzling Pieces" wallpaper
■特典３：『星の欠片の物語。しかけ版』壁紙
4k compatible. 2k version can also be downloaded from the special site.
2157770.supported_languages:
日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
developers: フォージビジョン株式会社
